creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
It looks like it should build fine, with no errors on PortsFallout[1] and 6.6.3 builds fine on FreeBSD 13 and CURRENT according to FreshPorts[2].

1. https://portsfallout.com/fallout?port=+www%2Fqt6-webengine
2. https://www.freshports.org/www/qt6-webengine
